indication: sample values in this column are ['TNBC', 'HR+/HER2-']
Line_of_Therapy_LOT: in which line of treatment the patients are in - sample values are [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, ..., 12]
new_patient_flag: sample values in this column are [1, 0] where 1 indicates new patient
patient_birth_year: used to calculate the age of the patient
procedure_code: This column contains codes contains surgery and bc surgery codes select this when user ask about any surgery codes etc.
product_name: sample product names present are ['TRUQAP', 'CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE', 'LETROZOLE', 'ANASTROZOLE', 'ZOLADEX', 'FULVESTRANT', 'PACLITAXEL', 'EXEMESTANE', 'LEUPROLIDE ACE', 'DOCETAXEL', 'HALAVEN', 'EVEROLIMUS', 'TALZENNA', 'TAMOXIFEN CIT', 'DOXORUBICIN HCL', 'VERZENIO', 'TRODELVY', 'IBRANCE', 'KISQALI', 'PIQRAY', 'CAPECITABINE', 'ENHERTU', 'ORSERDU', 'LYNPARZA', 'FLUOROURACIL', 'KISQALI FEMARA', 'GEMCITABINE HCL', 'METHOTREXATE SOD', 'ARIMIDEX', 'MEGESTROL ACE', 'FEMARA', 'AROMASIN', 'VINORELBINE TART', 'XELODA', 'nan', 'AFINITOR', 'IXEMPRA', 'SOLTAMOX', 'TOREMIFENE CIT', 'LUPRON DEPOT-1MO.', 'EPIRUBICIN HCL', 'FASLODEX', 'FARESTON', 'ABRAXANE', 'TREXALL', 'ELIGARD', 'LUPRON DEPOT-3MO.', 'DOXORUBICIN LIPO', 'ELLENCE', 'MEGACE', 'DOXIL', 'ADRIAMYCIN', 'ADRIAMYCIN PFS', 'KEYTRUDA', 'OXALIPLATIN', 'CARBOPLATIN', 'TECENTRIQ', 'IRINOTECAN HCL', 'CISPLATIN', 'ATEZOLIZUMAB', 'ONIVYDE', 'TRAZIMERA', 'PHESGO', 'NEOSAR', 'CYTOXAN']
regimen_grouped_name: drug names are present in this column sample values are = ['ANTHRACYCLINE BASED', 'CDK', 'ENHERTU BASED', 'FULVESTRANT BASED', 'GEMZAR BASED', 'HALAVEN BASED', 'ORSERDU BASED', 'OTHER CHEMO', 'OTHER COMBINATION CHEMO', 'OTHER HORMONAL', 'OTHER SINGLE CHEMO', 'OTHER TARGETED', 'PARP BASED', 'PD-1/PD-L1 BASED', 'PLATINUM BASED', 'TAXANE BASED', 'TRODELVY BASED', 'VINORELBINE BASED', 'XELODA BASED']
source_of_business: indicates which drugs the patient was previously taking
Year_Month: start year_month of regimen group -> contains combination of only year and month ('YYYYMM' -> '202306'), use this for R3M/R12M/monthly analysis
Year: sample values are [2022, 2023, 2024] contains string values
